name: 43-prompt-jailbreak-advanced

name: 60-token-budget-velocity-law

desc: Every color has 12 semantic steps. Agents MUST use semantic roles, not raw numbers.

desc: > **A human keystroke MUST gate any command that is irreversible, affects shared state, or has a blast radius beyond the current working directory.**
